items.briefing:
AI is making phishing attacks easier and more convincing than ever, with cybercriminals now running highly organised, scalable scams that are harder to spot. Australians planning to watch the FIFA World Cup 2026 should also be cautious online — criminals are using the event to lure fans with fake ticketing sites, streaming links, and merchandise offers designed to steal personal and financial information.

Australia is also a world leader in self-hosted AI use, which brings added responsibility to protect those systems from misuse or breach. **Practical tip:** Be extra sceptical of unsolicited emails or websites offering World Cup deals — verify sellers directly before clicking any links or entering payment details.

featured.title: Australia leads in self-hosted AI use, JFrog finds
featured.quote: Australia leads self-hosted AI use but lacks critical secrets scanning and audit capabilities.
